title: NOMOS Public Query Response
description: Response body from POST /query, and from GET /queries/{query_id} (NOMOS-SPEC-005 §1-2) — the sealed, permanent transcript of a public query.

verdict.description: The authority's own verdict, verbatim. AUTHORIZED = permitted. DENIED = a blocking rule matched, MUST NOT proceed. ESCALATED = no rule reached a definitive outcome, or human review is explicitly required.

verdict_description.description: Human-readable explanation. SHOULD name the matched rule.

matched_rule_id.description: The rule that decided the verdict, if any. null when a default/catch-all outcome applied.

open_higher_priority_count.description: How many rules of strictly higher priority than the matched rule evaluated to unknown (neither definitively true nor false) given the supplied inputs, computed once at the moment of evaluation. 0 means every higher-priority rule was fully resolved. See NOMOS-SPEC-005 §1.4. Excluded from audit_hash.

query_id.description: Permanent, unguessable, addressable transcript identifier. A bearer capability to this specific past query.

audit_hash.description: Content hash over { query_id, seal_hash, inputs, verdict, queried_at } (NOMOS-SPEC-005 §2.2). Independently re-computable without calling the runtime.

examples.verdict_description: Rule "Prohibition: circumvention of international obligations" (rule-018-2) triggered. The authority denies this action.
